opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My usual dull headache has become a sharp, crushing pressure behind my eyes, I can't see properly out the sides, and clear fluid keeps dripping from my nose.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The headache I've had for ages suddenly got much worse over the last day, my side vision has gone in both eyes, and I keep getting clear watery drips from one nostril, especially when I lean forward.

symptom_narrative.onset: the sharp worsening started about 24 hours ago on a background of dull headaches I've had for a long time
symptom_narrative.duration: about a day for the severe change; the dull headaches have been going on for months
symptom_narrative.character: the old headache was a dull ache; now it's a sharp crushing pressure behind both eyes
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: much worse than my usual headache — I've had to stay in bed and keep the lights off
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: behind both eyes and across the front of my head
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: lying still in a dark room helps the light hurting my eyes a bit
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: bright light, and leaning forward makes the nose dripping worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: losing the vision at the sides in both eyes, clear watery fluid dripping from my right nostril, and light really hurting my eyes
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get dull headaches often but never like this, and I've never had the vision loss or the nose dripping before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't do much — I'm stuck in bed with the headache and the light sensitivity, and I'm worried about my balance with my side vision gone

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: always tired and run down, and I feel the cold more than other people
past_medical_history.when_diagnosed: ongoing for a while, never fully looked into

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; worried about falling because of the new side-vision loss and the severe headache

objective_data_offered.value: I keep bumping into things on both sides — my side vision has gone in both eyes
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported peripheral vision change; not a formal visual-field test

objective_data_offered.value: clear watery fluid keeps dripping from my right nostril, and it's worse when I lean forward
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient description of the fluid only; cannot be tested for its nature over chat

objective_data_offered.value: the light really hurts my eyes so I'm keeping the room dark
